_meta.description: First Reconnaissance Scenario — Introductory solo scenario

victoryConditions.endTrigger: When a player reveals a city tile, all players have one last turn. If the round ends naturally, the game ends immediately.
victoryConditions.winner: Player with the most Fame wins.

specialRules.description: Gain 1 Fame whenever you reveal a new tile (any type).
City is revealed but cannot be conquered.
Spells and Advanced Action cards should not be revealed until needed for the first time.

soloSetup.dummyPlayerTacticSelection: Dummy player always takes the lowest-numbered available tactic.

achievementBonuses.name: Greatest Knowledge
achievementBonuses.description: Most Advanced Actions + Spells in deed deck
